# Bedrock Concrete Solutions
## Foundations Built for Northern Winters

Bedrock Concrete Solutions is a concrete and foundation contractor serving Thunder Bay and Northwestern Ontario. We build foundations, driveways, garage pads, decorative concrete installations, and handle concrete repairs — work that has to last through Northwestern Ontario's severe freeze-thaw cycles and frost conditions.

## Services
1. Foundations & Footings — residential and commercial foundation construction, frost walls, and concrete footings built to Northern Ontario depth requirements
2. Driveways & Walkways — poured concrete driveways, pathways, and curbing designed for heavy snow loads and de-icing conditions
3. Garage Pads & Slabs — reinforced concrete slabs for garages, shops, and outbuildings
4. Decorative Concrete — exposed aggregate, stamped concrete, and coloured finishes for patios and entryways
5. Repair & Resurfacing — crack repair, spalling remediation, and resurfacing of deteriorated concrete

## Location and Service Area
- Based in Thunder Bay, Ontario
- Serving Thunder Bay and Northwestern Ontario
- Service communities include: Fort William, Kakabeka Falls, Neebing, Oliver Paipoonge

## Contact
- Phone: (807) 555-0142
- Email: info@bedrockconcrete.ca
- Website: https://bedrockconcrete.ca

## Business Context
- Trade: Concrete & Foundation Work
- Region: Northwestern Ontario, Canada
- Climate note: All work is engineered for Northern Ontario frost depths and seasonal ground movement
